meta.title: Aura Score Test | DopaBrain
meta.description: Scan your 7 chakra zones to complete your aura field! What's your energy score?

app.title: Aura Field Scanner
app.subtitle: Scan your 7 chakra zones
app.description: Tap each chakra zone on the body silhouette to answer energy questions. Watch your aura field come alive as each zone fills with color.

q1.text: Do you often experience deep meditation or contemplation?

q2.text: Do you trust your intuition for important decisions?

q1.text: Can you sense other people's emotions without them speaking?

q2.text: Do you have vivid, meaningful dreams?

q1.text: Do you express your thoughts and feelings honestly?
q1.b: No, I tend to hold back

q2.text: Do you give genuine compliments to others easily?

q1.text: Can you easily empathize with strangers?

q2.text: Have you forgiven past hurts and let them go?
Do you take the lead in difficult situations?

q1.text: Do you feel passionate about creativity and new ideas?

q2.text: Do you frequently experience joy and pleasure in daily life?

q1.text: Do you feel stable and secure in your current life?

q2.text: Do you maintain a consistent daily routine?

blocked.name: Blocked Energy
blocked.desc: Most of your chakras are closed. Take time to invest in yourself and awaken your inner energy.

dormant.name: Dormant Aura
dormant.desc: Energy exists but hasn't fully awakened yet. Self-exploration and small changes will brighten your aura.

awakened.name: Awakened Aura
awakened.desc: Several chakras are activated! You're finding energy balance and walking the path of growth.

radiant.name: Radiant Aura
radiant.desc: You carry an intense energy field. People around you definitely feel your presence.

legendary.name: Legendary Aura
legendary.desc: All chakras are perfectly aligned. You are the embodiment of energy, you ARE the aura itself.

share.title: Share Your Aura
share.text: My aura score is {score}! I'm "{tier}" level. Check yours:
